patches.hypothesis: The root cause of the overfitting was the reliance on a single edge case when the other edge cases were ignored. I focused on the failing test requirements and used a more robust null check to handle different types of constraints.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the lack of a null check in the `matchConstraint` method, which results in a null pointer exception when the `constraintObj` parameter is null.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the method not properly handling the case where the constraint object is a record type.
